# Luxe Window Works — Custom Window Treatments in Northern Idaho

> Northern Idaho's trusted source for custom blinds, shades, shutters, and motorized window treatments. Local service, lifetime installation guarantee.

Luxe Window Works is a custom window treatment specialist based in Post Falls, Idaho, serving the greater Coeur d'Alene area and Inland Northwest. Founded by Mark Abplanalp — a 20+ year industry veteran — Luxe Window Works specializes in energy-efficient window coverings, motorized smart home integration, and white-glove installation service.

## What We Do

- **Custom Blinds & Shades**: Cellular, roller, solar, roman, and banded shades custom-fitted to any window
- **Plantation Shutters**: Premium shutters for light control and privacy
- **Motorization & Smart Home Integration**: Bond Bridge Pro, motorized shades, smart scene automation
- **Energy Efficiency**: Cellular honeycomb shades reducing energy costs up to 20%, R-values up to 7.86
- **Child Safety**: Cordless and motorized options eliminating cord hazards
- **Free Consultation**: No-pressure in-home consultation and measurement

## Products

- Cellular Shades (Honeycomb): https://www.luxewindowworks.com/cellular-shades/
- Solar Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/solar-shades/
- Roller Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/roller-shades/
- Roman Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/roman-shades/
- Banded Shades: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/banded-shades/
- Motorization: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/motorization/
- Shutters: https://www.luxewindowworks.com/shutters/

- Owner: Mark Abplanalp — 20+ year window treatment industry expert
- Phone: (208) 660-8643

- Hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 9am–12pm, Sun Closed
- Service Area: Coeur d'Alene, Post Falls, Hayden, Hayden Lake, Rathdrum, Sandpoint, Kootenai County

## Authority Signals

- 20+ years industry expertise
- Lifetime installation guarantee
- Direct manufacturer relationships for better materials and accountability
- Specialization in smart home motorization and energy efficiency
- Serving Northern Idaho homeowners since 2002
